overview: DemonZeno (DMNZ) is a meme token + free trading signals platform with an anime open-road aesthetic. It delivers daily free crypto, forex, and stock signals, features a password-protected AI powered by 50+ providers, and includes a full admin dashboard accessible from inside the AI chat.
features: Password-protected AI chat with Normal and Insane modes (50+ AI providers)
Secret admin dashboard unlockable via AI chat with exact slogan passphrase
Real-time token price and market trend display in Market Sentiment section
Full signal archive with search and multi-filter (confidence, result, date, market)
Roadmap with 2026-2028 milestones including DMNZ launch and buyback & burn
Token burn tracker and community counter (admin-controlled)
BLUM mini app preview animated mockup and 2027 launch countdown
Admin dashboard with signal CRUD, FAQ management, analytics, audit log, and Binance Square feed editor
Anime open-road visual design with sky blue, teal, dark charcoal, and crimson palette
